mapper.select: SELECT state, COUNT(*) AS count, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sensor_reading), 2) AS ratio FROM sensor_reading GROUP BY state ORDER BY state

SELECT sr.eq_id, e.eq_name, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN sr.state = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS danger_count, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN sr.state = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS danger_ratio FROM sensor_reading sr JOIN equipment e ON sr.eq_id = e.eq_id GROUP BY sr.eq_id, e.eq_name ORDER BY danger_ratio DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT bucket AS hour, ROUND(AVG(val), 2) AS avg_value, ROUND(MAX(val), 2) AS max_value FROM ( SELECT ${sensorName} AS val, NTILE(20) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) AS bucket FROM sensor_reading WHERE eq_id = #{eqId} ) t GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
